summary: 1 new test failure beyond the 2 pre-existing baseline failures. The test consoleHtmlKeepsSavedAnnotationPreviewsInCenterDeviceOnly fails at FeedbackConsoleServerTest.kt:1639 because the assertion assertTrue(html.contains("const persistedItems = savedEvidenceItems();")) is not satisfied — this string does not appear anywhere in app.js or the console source files (preview.js, rendering.js). The other 2 acceptance criteria tests (consoleHtmlKeepsFrozenPreviewStableAndShowsPersistedScreenHistory and generatedConsoleAppMatchesConsoleSourceModules) pass. Full suite: 283 tests, 3 failed (2 pre-existing + 1 new).
